name: ConnectAndSell AI Sales Dialing API
what_it_does: AI-powered sales conversation platform with API — using a combination of human agents and AI to navigate phone trees, reach gatekeepers, and connect sales reps directly to live conversations with prospects, dramatically increasing dials-to-conversation ratios for outbound sales teams.
use_cases: Integrating ConnectAndSell outcomes (conversations, voicemails) with CRM for activity logging
Querying ConnectAndSell session metrics (dials, connects, conversations) for sales reporting
Syncing ConnectAndSell prospect lists with Salesforce or HubSpot contact records
Triggering follow-up sequences from ConnectAndSell conversation outcomes via webhook
Pulling rep performance data (conversations/hour) for coaching and quota analytics
not_for: Inbound customer service calls (use Five9 or Talkdesk for inbound contact center)
Marketing automation and email sequences (use Outreach or Salesloft for multi-channel)
Small teams (<5 reps) without high-volume outbound dialing needs
best_when: An enterprise B2B sales team has SDRs making high-volume outbound calls and needs to increase live conversations per hour — especially in heavily gatekept markets where phone trees and voicemail are the biggest bottlenecks.
avoid_when: You have a small sales team, primarily rely on inbound leads, or need multi-channel outreach beyond just phone conversations.

auth.notes: API key from ConnectAndSell account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events, dispositions, and voicemail outcomes. Salesforce native integration (managed package). HubSpot integration via API. TCPA compliance tools built in. No OAuth2 for REST API.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-seat or per-conversation pricing; contact sales; $1,000-5,000+/month typical
pricing.notes: Los Gatos, CA company. Founded 2007. Bootstrapped for many years, later raised funding. Pioneer in conversation automation — using human 'conversation automation agents' to handle pre-conversation navigation. Conversation-per-hour metric is key KPI (typically 8-10x improvement over manual dialing). Used by Oracle, Dell, SAP sales teams. TCPA compliance for US outbound calling required.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sessions, outcomes, and reporting. API key auth. Limited public API documentation. Salesforce managed package handles most CRM integration natively. Webhook for conversation disposition events. Human-assisted dialing model — not fully autonomous. TCPA compliance training required before use.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Session reads idempotent. Conversation reads idempotent. List uploads not idempotent — check for duplicates before adding contacts.
known_agent_gotchas: TCPA compliance mandatory — illegal to call DNC-listed numbers; implement DNC scrubbing
Human conversation automation agents on backend — not fully AI-automated
Salesforce managed package is primary integration path — REST API is secondary
High-touch sales product — annual contract; onboarding training required
Enterprise pricing ($1K-5K+/month) — ROI calculation requires meaningful outbound volume

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 compliant. US data residency. API key auth. TCPA compliance required for all outbound calling — implement DNC (Do Not Call) list scrubbing. Call recording data is legally sensitive — follow state recording consent laws. Prospect phone number data is PII — handle appropriately.
